metadata.description: Job category taxonomy for skills/faceted search filters with months/years preferred-duration metadata. Leaf skill entries have optional months/years preferences for duration. Designed for later integration with jobs and freelancers tables.

categories.name: Design
categories.description: User interface, graphic visual design, and UX layout work.

skills.name: UI/UX Design
skills.description: End-to-end product interaction flows and screen layouts.

skills.name: Brand Design
skills.description: Visual identity, logos, brand guidelines, and design systems.

skills.name: Graphic Design
skills.description: Static graphics, illustrations, and visual assets.

skills.name: Identity Design
skills.description: Facial look-and-feel, typography direction, and social assets.

categories.name: Identity
categories.description: Identity design and visual language for products/users.

skills.name: Brand Identity
skills.description: Shop logos, guidelines, tone-of-voice decks covering name, tagline, style direction.

categories.name: Video
categories.description: Video production, editing, animation, and visual effects.

skills.name: Video Production
skills.description: Full production workflows from concept to final delivery, including planning, shooting, and full post.

skills.name: Video Editing
skills.description: Editing raw footage into final cuts, with sound design and color grading.

skills.name: Motion Graphics
skills.description: Animated graphics, kinetic typography, 2D/3D motion, overlays, and title sequences.

skills.name: Visual Effects (VFX)
skills.description: Compositing, particle effects, matte painting, and multi-shot VFX integration.

categories.name: LLM
categories.description: Large Language Model development, integration, optimization, and evaluation.

skills.name: LLM Fine-tuning
skills.description: Adapting a foundation LLM to specialized domains using instruction tuning or PEFT techniques.

skills.name: RAG / Retrieval-Augmented Generation
skills.description: Building retrieval pipelines with vector DBs to ground LLM responses on proprietary data.

skills.name: LLM Prompt Engineering
skills.description: Designing and optimizing prompts for reliability, safety, and output quality.

skills.name: LLM Evaluation
skills.description: Model evaluation frameworks, benchmarks, and human-in-the-loop testing workflows.

categories.name: Designer
categories.description: Generalist design work across products, systems, and assets.

skills.name: Product Design
skills.description: End-to-end product UX and UI, from wireframes to high-fidelity screens and design systems.

skills.name: Brand Identity
skills.description: Building and evolving brand visual identity, logos, assets, and guidelines.

skills.name: MM12E
skills.description: Market Member 12-Entry (MM12E) model-based design; customizing templates for market positioning and brand assets.
